introSection: Nefeskesen (Turkish for Breath Taker) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Vialand in Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey. It was manufactured by Intamin and installed by RCS GmbH.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * A website with many photographs of Nefeskesen

fullText:
Nefeskesen (Turkish for Breath Taker) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Vialand in Istanbul, Istanbul, Turkey. It was manufactured by Intamin and installed by RCS GmbH.

Red track and grey supports.




 * A website with many photographs of Nefeskesen
